title: Rotation countdown
description: Countdown timer for `expires_at`. Renders as text with colour + icon that shift based on days remaining: > 30 days = neutral text; 14-30 days = neutral text with `clock` icon; 0-14 days (warning window) = warning text with `clock-alert` icon; past expires_at = danger text with `exclamation-circle` icon + '(expired X days ago)' suffix. NULL expires_at renders as `— no expiry` in muted text (rare; used only for platform-critical bootstrap SAs).

props.className: flex items-center gap-1 text-warning text-sm font-medium
flex items-center gap-1 text-danger text-sm font-medium

notes: The widget is READ-ONLY — it does not itself trigger rotation. The list surface + show screen render adjacent action buttons (Rotate) that navigate to the rotation flow.
Time computation is server-authoritative (days_until_expiry is passed in); the widget does not re-compute against browser clock to avoid drift + timezone confusion.
